case_title: BOLY LU VS. SHAO FENG ZHANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
